_comment: Copy this file to telegram.config.json and fill in your values. telegram.config.json is git-ignored so your token stays private. Env vars (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN / TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID) override these. Leave botToken empty to disable Telegram entirely.

_howToGet.botToken: Open Telegram, message @BotFather, send /newbot, follow the prompts. It replies with a token like 123456789:AAE...; paste it as botToken.
_howToGet.chatId: Easiest way: leave chatId empty, start MuxRunner, then send any message to your bot. It replies with your numeric chat id — paste that here and restart. (Or use a group/channel id, e.g. -1001234567890.)
